passives.name: Inflame
passives.effects: Dealing [[ability damage]] burns enemies, causing them to take {{as|{{ap|15/6}} magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds over 3 seconds, for a total of {{as|15|magic damage}}. Against monsters, the burn deals {{as|{{fd|7.5}} '''bonus''' magic damage}} per tick, dealing a total of {{as|{{ap|(15/6)+7.5}} magic damage}} per tick for up to {{as|{{ap|15+(7.5*6)}}|magic damage}}.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing [[ability damage]] burns enemies, causing them to take {{as {{ap 15/6}} magic damage}} every {{fd 0.5}} seconds over 3 seconds, for a total of {{as 15 magic damage}}

Against monsters, the burn deals {{as {{fd 7.5}} '''bonus''' magic damage}} per tick, dealing a total of {{as {{ap (15/6)+7.5}} magic damage}} per tick for up to {{as {{ap 15+(7.5*6)}} magic damage}}.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: ability damage applies the burn, then damage resolves every 0.5 seconds for 3 seconds (player-visible periodic damage ticks).
Inflame base burn totals 15 magic damage over full duration; monster bonus adds +7.5 magic damage per tick (45 bonus total over full duration).
